title: Studio UI Framework
content_html:
Studio UI Framework

This is a legacy source doc. Its stable material is being consolidated into UI and the matching child docs under UI Catalogue.

This document now acts as the index for the remaining Studio-specific UI framework reference. Start with Studio UI Start before using these deeper references.

Coverage

The split child docs cover:

  • shared Studio naming boundaries and primitive classes
  • shared toolbar, filter, list, form, message, and result patterns
  • modal type selection and interaction contracts
  • shared modal controller and shell-renderer implementation boundaries
  • page-specific boundaries, review rules, and current shared coverage

Child References

  • Primitives
  • Modal Contract
  • Modal Implementation
  • Review And Coverage
